name: Cheesy Cream of Broccoli Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds cooked or uncooked broccoli, roughly chopped
3 quarts chicken stock or water, OR canned low-sodium broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it softens, about 10 minutes.
3. Add the broccoli, salt, and optional Pernod. Continue to cook, stirring, another 15 minutes.
4. Add the stock. Cover, increase heat to high, and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and transfer to a food processor or blender. Puree until smooth.
7. Combine the puree, cream, and milk. Serve piping hot and offer grated cheese on the side to add to the soup.
